name: submit_vacation_request
description: Submit a new request for vacation time off.

requiredFields.name: startDate
requiredFields.label: Start Date
requiredFields.description: The first day of your vacation

requiredFields.name: endDate
requiredFields.label: End Date
requiredFields.description: The last day of your vacation

requiredFields.name: type
requiredFields.label: Leave Type
requiredFields.description: The category of time off being requested

confirmationMessage: You are about to submit a request for {{type}} from {{startDate}} to {{endDate}}.
successMessage: Successfully submitted your request. Your manager has been notified.

name: cancel_pending_request
description: Cancel an existing time off request that has not yet occurred.

requiredFields.name: requestId
requiredFields.label: Request ID
requiredFields.description: The unique identifier for the vacation request

confirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel request #{{requestId}}?
successMessage: Request #{{requestId}} has been successfully canceled and your balance has been adjusted.

name: check_balance
description: Retrieve the current available balance for a specific leave type.

requiredFields.name: leaveType
requiredFields.label: Leave Type
requiredFields.description: The specific bucket you want to check

name: update_request_dates
description: Modify the dates of a previously submitted time off request.

requiredFields.name: requestId
requiredFields.label: Request ID
requiredFields.description: ID of the request to modify

confirmationMessage: You are updating request #{{requestId}} to the new dates: {{newStartDate}} to {{newEndDate}}.
successMessage: Successfully updated the dates for request #{{requestId}}.

name: download_leave_history
description: Generate a PDF report of all leave taken in a specific calendar year.

requiredFields.name: year
requiredFields.label: Calendar Year
requiredFields.description: The year for which you want the report (e.g., 2023)

confirmationMessage: Generating a report for all leave taken in {{year}}...
successMessage: Your leave history report for {{year}} is ready for download.
